arts.ttl: Newcastle United star to be left upset after big selection change at Southampton
arts.sum: Howe, speaking at his press conference tahead of the encounter against the Saints, said: "Yes, it was a challenge for Sven and I think Fabian has been ill and he wasn't 100% fit and then we had Sven who had done really well. Howe had picked Botman over Schar when the Swiss star missed the 3-0 win over Wolves with an illness.

arts.ttl: Team News: Southampton vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Southampton and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Newcastle coach hints at inadequate offers for Juventus target Kelly
arts.sum: Eddie Howe says Newcastle have not received adequate offers for Juventus target Lloyd Kelly and...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United have 'game-changing' stadium and training ground plans that PSR can't stop
arts.sum: Howe provided input when Newcastle's current Benton base was modernised and the Magpies boss and assistant Jason Tindall also previously spent time designing Bournemouth's new training ground during their time on the South Coast. Newcastle hope to soon reach a decision on whether to 'transform' St James' Park or build a new stadium elsewhere and the Magpies also want to one day construct a state-of-the-art training ground.

arts.ttl: 'Certainly not' - Juventus £25m transfer message as Newcastle confirm Miguel Almiron status - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Speaking on Almiron's situation, Howe said: "I think that Miggy's head has been very, very solidly here. Howe said: "I think it's a slightly different situation with Lloyd.

arts.ttl: Ex-Newcastle United millionaire, 32, now earning £360 a week as an apprentice
arts.sum: Ameobi, who made 70 appearances for the Toon Army senior team during his seven year spell, told the magistrates court he had crashed his Audi E-Tron car into a teenager's Citroen C1 during morning rush hour before fleeing the scene. A former Newcastle United winger who earned millions during his time at St James' Park has claimed to be now on £22,000 a year after pleading guilty to a hit and run.

arts.ttl: Club will do ‘everything possible’ to sign Southampton man – But Tottenham in concrete talks with agents
arts.sum: RB Leipzig will continue to do ‘everything possible’ to sign Tyler Dibling from Southampton, but face competition from Tottenham for him. That’s according to journalist Florian Plettenberg, who reports that Dibling has given the impression he would be open to a move to the Bundesliga. Plettenberg states that Leipzig would like to sign Dibling now The post Club will do ‘everything possible’ to sign Southampton man – But Tottenham in concrete talks with agents appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United respond to Jonathan David rumours as Eddie Howe makes transfer 'lie' pledge
arts.sum: As reported by Chronicle Live on January 16, head of recruitment Steve Nickson was spotted in the stands at Brentford for the 2-2 draw with Manchester City . The feeling at Newcastle this month is that the Magpies must sell to buy if they want a January purchase.

arts.ttl: Newcastle travel plans for Southampton game upended by Storm Éowyn
arts.sum: High winds force cancellation of flight from Newcastle ‘We could end up travelling on Saturday morning’ Storm Éowyn has left Newcastle facing the prospect of a late arrival on the south coast for Saturday’s match at Southampton. Eddie Howe and his players were due to fly to Hampshire on Friday afternoon but dangerously high winds forced the cancellation of a raft of flights to and from Newcastle airport. The north east is currently under an amber weather alert, with wind speeds expected to reach up to 90mph. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Southampton defender Kyle Walker-Peters seen as alternative for Galatasaray – On their wish list
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Galatasaray are showing interest in Southampton defender Kyle Walker-Peters. Galatasaray’s issues at right back have been well documented in recent months and subsequently they’ve turned their attention to the Saints player.
